title: Cheer API Issue
message: The in-game Cheer API is currently missing some Cheers, so leaderboard totals may be incomplete. A fix has been submitted but has not yet been released.
emphasizedMessages: If the fix is released before the competition ends and missing Cheers are restored, the raffle will use both Helps and Cheers as originally planned.
If the issue is not resolved in time, the raffle will be based on verified Helper data only to ensure every participant is treated fairly.
